notes: B5 real-backend correction-propagation + provenance citation locked from memd-server subprocess (HttpB5Backend). Sessions are no-ops because real memd-server persists via SQLite; correction is applied via /memory/correct in s2 and queried in {3,5,8}. Provenance is detected via a per-correction tag (b5-seed{seed}-s{idx}-correct-{fact_id}) attached at correct time — server's correct_item does not populate correction_meta.source_turn so tags are the canonical wire-level signal. propagation_rate_s3 / propagation_rate_s8 floors must hold; provenance_rate_avg averages across query_sessions.
